description_long: This rifle features a modern, angular design with a prominent arrow-shaped muzzle and a rectangular receiver body. The main body is predominantly matte black, with a textured grip and a vertical foregrip for enhanced handling. The barrel is short and compact, with a yellow accent at the rear, possibly representing a charging handle or bolt. The receiver has three visible circular ports along the side, adding to its tactical appearance. The overall construction appears robust, with a focus on functionality and ease of use in urban environments. The rifle lacks visible iron sights or optics, and the stock is not present or is integrated into the body.
description: A modern, angular black rifle with a short barrel, arrow-shaped muzzle, and yellow rear accent, featuring a textured grip and vertical foregrip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the arrow-shaped muzzle, three circular ports on the receiver, and yellow rear accent.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the slim profile and vertical alignment of the grip and foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the arrow-shaped muzzle pointing right, similar features as view 0 but mirrored.
description_view_3: Rear end-on view showing the compact width and alignment of the grip and foregrip.
